## Summary

- What changed?
- Why this change is needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Single-purpose PR
- [ ] No unrelated refactor
- [ ] Shared APIs unchanged or explicitly documented

## Quality Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No new `any` unless justified in PR description

## UI Impact (if applicable)

- [ ] Screenshot/video attached
- [ ] Responsive behavior checked
- [ ] Accessibility basics checked (focus, labels, semantics)

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Notes for Reviewers

- Hotspots/files to review first:
- Follow-up tasks (if any):
